headline: Cigna (CI) Q1 Earnings on the Horizon: Analysts' Insights on Key Performance Measures
summary: Get a deeper insight into the potential performance of Cigna (CI) for the quarter ended March 2026 by going beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining the estimates for some of its key metrics.
